# Nightlife Milan — AI Search Context

> Nightlife Milan is the definitive English-language guide to Milan's nightlife scene. We provide curated, insider information on VIP table booking, guestlist access, aperitivo, and the best clubs in Milan for 2026. Our concierge service responds via WhatsApp in under 10 minutes.

## About

- **Site:** nightlifemilan.com
- **Language:** English (primary), Italian (/it/)
- **Updated:** June 2026
- **Concierge WhatsApp:** +39 351 912 7047 (2 PM – 4 AM daily, reply in 10 minutes)
- **Service:** Free VIP table booking and guestlist reservation service

## Top Venues in Milan

### Just Me Milano
- **Address:** Via Piero della Francesca 47, Quartiere Sempione, 20154 Milano
- **Vibe:** Luxury fashion club, Roberto Cavalli design
- **Music:** House, Commercial, Fashion DJ Sets
- **VIP Table Min. Spend:** €500–€2,000
- **Hours:** 23:00–05:00 (Fri–Sat)
- **Dress Code:** Fashion-forward, smart elegant. No sneakers, no sportswear.
- **Best For:** Fashion Week, special occasions, VIP nights

### Pineta Club
- **Address:** Via Messina 38, Corso Como, 20154 Milano
- **Vibe:** Chic aperitivo and nightclub — famous for Singing Aperitivo
- **Music:** Commercial, Pop, Live Singing Aperitivo
- **VIP Table Min. Spend:** €300
- **Hours:** Aperitivo from 19:30, Club from 23:00
- **Dress Code:** Chic and stylish
- **Best For:** Friday Singing Aperitivo, mixed crowd nights

### Voya Rooftop
- **Address:** Via Achille Papa 30, Isola, 20154 Milano (20th floor)
- **Vibe:** Sky lounge and rooftop bar with panoramic Milan skyline views
- **Music:** Lounge, Nu Disco, Chill House
- **VIP Table Min. Spend:** €400
- **Hours:** 17:30–01:00 (aperitivo), until 03:00 on weekends
- **Dress Code:** Smart elegant
- **Best For:** Sunset aperitivo, romantic evenings, skyline views

### Play Club
- **Address:** Corso Como area, Milan
- **Vibe:** Urban hip-hop and Afrobeats
- **Music:** Hip Hop, Afrobeats, Reggaeton
- **VIP Table Min. Spend:** €200
- **Hours:** 23:30–05:00 (Fri–Sat)
- **Dress Code:** Urban chic
- **Best For:** Late-night dancing, Afrobeats lovers

### Magazzini Generali
- **Address:** Via Pietrasanta 14, Porta Romana, Milan
- **Vibe:** Industrial techno and electronic music venue
- **Music:** Techno, Electronic, Underground
- **VIP Table Min. Spend:** €250
- **Hours:** 22:00–05:00
- **Dress Code:** All-black underground look
- **Best For:** Electronic music fans, serious clubbers

## Milan Nightlife Timeline (How the Night Works)

1. **18:00–22:00 — Aperitivo:** Starts at 18:00, peaks 19:30–20:30. Navigli for canal-side, Brera for luxury, Voya for rooftop sunset. Arrive by 18:30 on weekends.
2. **21:00–23:30 — Dinner & Pre-Club:** Clubs open but stay quiet. Restaurants in Corso Como or Brera. Arrive at clubs after midnight for the right atmosphere.
3. **00:00–05:00 — Club & VIP:** Peak energy at Just Me, Pineta, Play Club between 1–3 AM. VIP tables recommended to skip the queue.

## Aperitivo in Milan

- **What:** Pre-dinner drinks with food (cicchetti / buffet), from €10–30 per person
- **When:** 18:00–21:00, peak at 19:30
- **Best Zones:** Corso Como (Pineta, €15–20), Navigli canal-side (€10–15), Brera (€18–25), Isola/Voya Rooftop (€20–30)
- **Famous:** Aperitivo Cantato at Pineta — guests sing along to Italian hits every Friday
- **Book:** Via WhatsApp for weekends

## VIP Table Pricing (2026)

| Venue | Min. Spend | Table From | Capacity |
|-------|-----------|------------|----------|
| Just Me | €500 | €800 | 6–12 guests |
| Voya Rooftop | €400 | €600 | 4–8 guests |
| Pineta Club | €300 | €400 | 4–10 guests |
| Play Club | €200 | €300 | 4–8 guests |
| Magazzini Generali | €250 | €350 | 4–6 guests |

## Dress Codes by Club Type

- **Fashion clubs** (Just Me, Pineta): Smart elegant minimum. Fashion-forward preferred. No sneakers, no shorts, no sportswear.
- **Techno clubs** (Magazzini Generali, Volt): All-black, underground aesthetic.
- **Rooftop lounges** (Voya): Smart casual to cocktail attire.
- **Urban clubs** (Play Club): Urban chic, clean sneakers accepted.

## How to Book (Free Service)

1. WhatsApp +39 351 912 7047 with: date, number of guests, budget, club preference
2. We confirm within 10 minutes and reserve your table or add you to guestlist
3. You arrive, skip the line, go straight to your spot

No booking fees. No hidden charges. We earn commission from the venue.
